ops.body: Security review complete + dispositioned (criterion 2c73825 met). Independent sol xhigh review (daemonkit cc-notes 6e326c6): CF/purego bridge + DR pinning + fail-closed paths CLEARED. Six bounded blockers FIXED + shipped (daemonkit 94eda3ca, CI green): EUID floor (was peer euid vs daemon ruid), Server.Trust augments-not-replaces the floor, daemonkit_unsigned fails closed (was a production-selectable UID-only bypass), allow-jit added to injection list, dlsym fail-closed (was panic), corrected the false 'accepted/confined' godoc. ARCHITECTURAL: LOCAL_PEERTOKEN is query-time and admits same-UID fork/exec identity substitution → unsound as the code-auth binding; per-message XPC audit-token transport (task db24393) REQUIRED. Per user priority (2026-07-18): ship functional daemonkit + migrate all repos FIRST, XPC/security holes AFTER migration — LOCAL_PEERTOKEN rework is a deferred late wave, acceptable for the closed same-UID fleet with bounded fixes in place. TF9/TF10 also deferred.
